info.title: BinShield API
info.description: BinShield analyzes native binaries inside open-source packages (npm, PyPI) to detect hidden behaviors, supply-chain risks, and malicious code. Submit scans, retrieve analysis results, compare versions, and export SBOMs.

tags.name: Packages
tags.description: Search, inspect, diff, and export package analysis data

tags.name: Scans
tags.description: Submit and monitor binary scan jobs

tags.name: Organizations
tags.description: Manage organizations, repos, watchlists, and API keys

tags.name: Billing
tags.description: Checkout sessions and Stripe webhook handling

get.description: Returns service health status, repository mode, and default configuration.
Search for packages that have been analyzed by BinShield. Returns matching packages with their latest risk scores.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query string to filter packages by name

get.description: List all analyzed versions of a package within an ecosystem.
Retrieve the full analysis for a specific package version, including all binary analyses, behavior summaries, and findings.
Download a CycloneDX 1.5 Software Bill of Materials (SBOM) in JSON format for a specific package version.

Content-Disposition.description: Attachment filename for the SBOM download

get.description: Compare two versions of a package to see risk score changes, added/removed behaviors, and a summary of differences.

400.description: Missing from or to query parameter

post.description: Submit a package for binary analysis. If the analysis is already cached, the result is returned immediately with status 200. Otherwise a scan job is created and returned with status 202.

get.description: Retrieve the status and result of a previously submitted scan job.
Retrieve details of an organization. Requires authentication and membership in the organization.

403.description: Not a member of this organization

get.description: List all monitored repositories for an organization.

403.description: Not a member of this organization

post.description: Add a GitHub repository to the organization for monitoring.

403.description: Not a member of this organization

get.description: List all watchlists for an organization. Watchlists send alerts when monitored packages change.

403.description: Not a member of this organization

post.description: Create a new watchlist to receive alerts when monitored packages are updated or their risk profile changes.

destination.description: Channel-specific destination (email address, Slack webhook URL, or HTTP endpoint)

403.description: Not a member of this organization

post.summary: Add a package to a watchlist
post.description: Add a package to an existing watchlist to start receiving alerts when it changes.

version.description: Optional specific version to watch. Omit to watch all versions.

get.description: Retrieve the current subscription details for an organization.

403.description: Not a member of this organization

post.description: Create or update the subscription for an organization.

403.description: Not a member of this organization

get.description: List all API keys for an organization. Key values are masked; only prefixes are shown.

403.description: Not a member of this organization

post.description: Generate a new API key for the organization. The full key value is only returned once in the response.

201.description: API key created. The full key is only shown once.

403.description: Not a member of this organization

post.description: Create a Stripe checkout session to upgrade the organization to a paid plan.
Receives and processes Stripe webhook events (e.g., checkout.session.completed, invoice.paid). This endpoint verifies the Stripe signature header before processing.

parameters.name: stripe-signature
parameters.description: Stripe webhook signature for event verification

400.description: Signature verification failed or processing error

bearer.description: Bearer token in the Authorization header

defaultFailOn.description: Default risk level threshold for CI failures

detected.description: Whether this behavior category was detected

details.description: Human-readable details about the detected behavior

location.description: Source location or function name where the finding was identified

summary.description: AI-generated summary of the package analysis

totalBinarySize.description: Total size of all binaries in bytes

riskDelta.description: Change in risk score (positive means riskier)

source.description: Where the scan was initiated from

cacheHit.description: Whether the result was served from cache

error.description: Error message if the scan failed
